raw.message: Action PvP shooter with robots and huge guns!

hook.summary: High-octane mech combat featuring a massive missile barrage against an enemy robot.
hook.visual_action: A red and blue mech hovers over a city street, locking onto a target and unleashing a volley of rockets.

scene_flow: Mech hovers in a city environment and locks onto an enemy target.
The player mech fires a continuous stream of missiles while closing the distance.
The enemy mech is hit repeatedly and eventually explodes.
A 'KILL' text overlay appears over the smoking wreckage.
The screen cuts to a dark end card with 'INSTALL NOW!' and flying sparks.
audience_proxy: Male gamers 18-35 who enjoy tactical robot combat and high-action shooters.
